title: Astronomicon intake bootstrap repair for route/start templates (UTF-8 without BOM)
manual_repair_actions: Create TASK_ROUTE_MANIFEST_TEMPLATE.json and TASK_START_ACK_TEMPLATE.json in TASK_ENTRY_CORRIDOR
Rewrite both files as UTF-8 without BOM
Rerun Astronomicon intake for Stage3 taskpack
recommended_hardening: Add explicit UTF-8 BOM detection and actionable diagnostics in intake preflight
Add auto-rewrite helper for template files with encoding mismatch
Add fixture for BOM corruption and missing template pair in Astronomicon intake tests
